message:
fix(cli): pass rootDir to startBusInfrastructure and genome-list

- startBusInfrastructure now accepts rootDir, passes it to the Genome
  constructor so GenomeMutationService can resolve root-only agents
- genome-list command passes rootDir so allAgents() includes root agents
- Both oneshot and interactive mode pass rootDir to bus infrastructure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
